---
title: "About"
format: html
---

My name is Chengwei Zhang.

I completed my bachelor's degree in Mathematics at the University of California, Santa Barbara, and I am currently pursuing my MSBA degree at the University of California, San Diego.

My academic interests are in statistics, data analysis, and business analytics. I especially enjoy work that combines quantitative reasoning with practical applications.

I created this website as a place to organize and share my coursework, homework assignments, and class projects. As I continue through the program, I plan to keep updating this site with more course-related work.
